title: Trump Misstates Facts in State of the Union Regarding Charlotte Murder
summary: Trump incorrectly claimed the suspect in a Charlotte murder case entered the U.S. through open borders; the suspect is a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing debate around immigration and border security and the potential for misinformation in political discourse.

title: Swimming Pool Filter Maker Hayward Has Significant Presence in Clemmons, NC
summary: Hayward, a Charlotte-based company, is a major employer in Clemmons, NC, with over 1,000 workers at its plant.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates the importance of manufacturing jobs and the economic impact of private employers in local communities.

title: Charlotte Trade Shows Leverage Custom Canopy Tents for Brand Visibility
summary: Exhibitors at Charlotte trade shows are focusing on flexibility, visibility, and ROI by using custom canopy tents.
charlotte_impact: Illustrates marketing strategies employed by businesses to enhance brand presence and achieve ROI at trade events.

title: Mosaic Capital Partners Seeks Vice President of Business Development in Charlotte
summary: Mosaic Capital Partners, a Charlotte-based private equity firm, is seeking a VP of Business Development to expand employee ownership.
charlotte_impact: Indicates growth and investment in the Charlotte business sector, with a focus on employee ownership models.

title: Florence Airport Passenger Numbers Rise Despite Loss of Charlotte Flight
summary: Florence Regional Airport saw an increase in passengers in 2025, despite losing its American Airlines flight to Charlotte, NC.
charlotte_impact: Shows the fluctuating dynamics of regional air travel and the efforts to maintain and expand flight options.

title: Three Women Charged in Torture and Death of Girl in Charlotte, NC
summary: Three women in North Carolina are accused of torturing and killing a girl, keeping her in a dog crate at a Charlotte home.
charlotte_impact: Highlights a severe case of child abuse and the critical need for child protective services and community vigilance.

title: NC Primary Election Results Delayed Due to Issues in Halifax County
summary: The release of North Carolina primary election results is delayed due to problems in one Halifax County precinct.
charlotte_impact: Addresses potential issues with election integrity and the importance of accurate and timely vote counting.

title: North Carolina Prepares for Severe Weather Season
summary: North Carolina marks Severe Weather Preparedness Week as Daylight Saving Time begins, emphasizing storm awareness and safety.
charlotte_impact: Promotes public safety and preparedness in the face of potential severe weather events in the region.

title: Chemical Spill Halts Operations at Silfab Solar Plant in Fort Mill
summary: A potassium hydroxide spill at the Silfab Solar plant in Fort Mill is under investigation, raising environmental concerns.
charlotte_impact: Addresses environmental safety and the potential impact of industrial accidents on local communities.

title: NC Voters Weigh Key Issues in Primary Election
summary: North Carolina voters prioritize public safety and affordable housing in Tuesday's primary election.
charlotte_impact: Reflects the key concerns and priorities of voters in the state, shaping the political agenda.

title: North Carolina's Primary Evolution: From Party Control to Public Power
summary: North Carolina has a semi-closed primary system, allowing unaffiliated voters to choose which primary to vote in.
charlotte_impact: Explains the structure and evolution of the state's primary system and its impact on voter participation.

title: Suspects Wanted for Tobacco Shop Break-in in Kings Mountain
summary: Security footage shows two suspects breaking into a tobacco shop in Kings Mountain.
charlotte_impact: Highlights local crime and the use of security measures to identify and apprehend suspects.

title: Charlotte Leaders Outline 'Big Moves 2030' Transportation Projects
summary: Charlotte officials detailed the rapid deployment of "Big Moves 2030" transportation projects at the annual City Council retreat.
charlotte_impact: Indicates investment in infrastructure and transportation to improve mobility and support future growth.

title: Shake Shack to Open Concord Mills Location
summary: Shake Shack is set to open a new location at Concord Mills on Wednesday, March 11.
charlotte_impact: Demonstrates business expansion and increased dining options in the Concord Mills area.

title: West Charlotte High School Receives $2 Million for Entrepreneurship Program
summary: West Charlotte High School will receive $2 million to partner with the Iovine and Young Center to train future entrepreneurs.
charlotte_impact: Supports educational initiatives and entrepreneurship training for students, fostering future economic development.
